name: Oriental Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or heavy pan over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add a little sesame oil to the bottom of the pan.
3. Saute onions until translucent, set aside.
4. Open one can of kidney beans and drain; keep liquid from the other can.
5. Mash about 2 tablespoons of beans with a fork to create a creamy mixture.
6. Add mashed beans and juice from the drained can into the pan.
7. Cook for a couple minutes.
8. Stir in Szechuan sauce (start with 3 teaspoons, adjust to taste).
9. Add Vegeta if desired.
10. Mince or crush garlic cloves just before turning off the heat.
11. Mix minced garlic into the beans and let sit covered for a few minutes.
12. Serve over rice; serves 3-4 people.
Warning: Ensure the ingredients are properly incorporated to prevent any safety issues during cooking.
